column.name: ERSTELLER
column.description: Name of User Who Created the Data Record

column.name: E_DATUM
column.description: Date on Which the Data Record Was Created

column.name: AENDERER
column.description: Name of User who Most Recently Changed the Data Record

column.name: A_DATUM
column.description: Date on Which Data Record Was Changed

column.name: INAKTIV
column.description: Status of Code Group or Code Record
